verses.latin_vulgate: Canticum graduum.   Ad te levavi oculos meos,  qui habitas in cælis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲל֥וֹת אֵ֭לֶיךָ נָשָׂ֣אתִי אֶת־עֵינַ֑י הַ֝יֹּשְׁבִ֗י בַּשָּׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: To thee have I lifted up my eyes, who dwellest in heaven.
verses.finnish_biblia: Veisu korkeimmassa Kuorissa. Minä nostan silmäni sinun tykös, joka asut taivaissa.
verses.king_james: Unto thee lift I up mine eyes, O thou that dwellest in the heavens.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce sicut oculi servorum  in manibus dominorum suorum ;  sicut oculi ancillæ  in manibus dominæ suæ :  ita oculi nostri ad Dominum Deum nostrum,  donec misereatur nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֨ה כְעֵינֵ֪י עֲבָדִ֡ים אֶל־יַ֤ד אֲֽדוֹנֵיהֶ֗ם כְּעֵינֵ֣י שִׁפְחָה֮ אֶל־יַ֢ד גְּבִ֫רְתָּ֥הּ כֵּ֣ן עֵ֭ינֵינוּ אֶל־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ עַ֝֗ד שֶׁיְּחׇנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold as the eyes of servants are on the hands of their masters, As the eyes of the handmaid are on the hands of her mistress: so are our eyes unto the Lord our God, until he have mercy on us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, niinkuin palveliain silmät katsovat isäntänsä käsiin, niinkuin piikain silmät katsovat emäntäinsä käsiin, niin meidänkin silmämme katsovat Herraa meidän Jumalaamme, siihenasti että hän meitä armahtaa.
verses.king_james: Behold, as the eyes of servants look unto the hand of their masters, and as the eyes of a maiden unto the hand of her mistress; so our eyes wait upon the Lord our God, until that he have mercy upon us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miserere nostri, Domine, miserere nostri,  quia multum repleti sumus despectione ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חׇנֵּ֣נוּ יְהֹוָ֣ה חׇנֵּ֑נוּ כִּי־רַ֝֗ב שָׂבַ֥עְנוּ בֽוּז׃
verses.douay_rheims: Have mercy on us, O Lord, have mercy on us: for we are greatly filled with contempt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ole meille armollinen, Herra, ole meille armollinen! sillä me olemme sangen täytetyt ylönkatseesta;
verses.king_james: Have mercy upon us, O Lord, have mercy upon us: for we are exceedingly filled with contempt.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia multum repleta est anima nostra  opprobrium abundantibus, et despectio superbis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַבַּת֮ שָֽׂבְעָה־לָּ֢הּ נַ֫פְשֵׁ֥נוּ הַלַּ֥עַג הַשַּֽׁאֲנַנִּ֑ים הַ֝בּ֗וּז (לגאיונים) [לִגְאֵ֥י יוֹנִֽים]׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: For our soul is greatly filled: we are a reproach to the rich, and contempt to the proud.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sangen täynnä on meidän sielumme rikasten pilkkaa ja ylpeiden ylönkatsetta.
verses.king_james: Our soul is exceedingly filled with the scorning of those that are at ease, and with the contempt of the proud.
